methods.description: Process for collecting diatom samples from different sites along the Bagmati river to study the diversity and distribution of diatoms across varying levels of pollution.

steps.description: Select three diatom sampling sites along the Bagmati river: Mulkharka, Gokarna, and Pashupati-Guheshwori.
steps.searchable_summary: identify and select sampling sites along the Bagmati river

steps.description: Collect diatom samples from Mulkharka during summer, rainy, and winter seasons.
steps.searchable_summary: collect diatom samples from Mulkharka in different seasons

steps.description: Collect diatom samples from Gokarna during the rainy season.
steps.searchable_summary: collect diatom samples from Gokarna during rainy season

steps.description: Collect diatom samples from Pashupati-Guheshwori during the rainy season.
steps.searchable_summary: collect diatom samples from Pashupati-Guheshwori during rainy season
